summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NOC Center Admin User Management features. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified: user list, create user modal, role editing, 2FA setup with QR code, search/filter, and non-admin access denied.

console_warnings.message: React setState warning in LoginPage during render - minor issue, does not affect functionality
Recharts chart width/height warning during initial render

backend_api_tests: Admin login with admin@86bit.it succeeds with role=admin
GET /api/admin/users - Admin can list all users
POST /api/admin/users - Create user with operator role
POST /api/admin/users - Create user with viewer role
POST /api/admin/users - Create user with admin role
DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} - Delete user and verify removal
POST /api/admin/users/{id}/force-2fa - Returns QR code and secret
Unauthenticated access to admin endpoints denied
frontend_ui_tests: Stats cards show: Totale, MFA Attivo, Admin counts
User list displays name, email, role badge, MFA status
Create user modal opens with all fields (Nome, Email, Password, Ruolo)
Role selection buttons work (Admin, Operatore, Viewer)
User creation succeeds with toast notification
Search/filter users by name or email works
Inline role editing shows role buttons with cancel option
2FA setup modal shows QR code, manual key, verification input

critical_code_review_comments: Minor React warning: setState called during render in LoginPage - consider moving navigation logic to useEffect
seed_data_creation: Created test viewer user: test_ui_user@noctest.com for access control testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin user management fully tested. All CRUD operations work. 2FA endpoints return proper QR codes (base64 PNG). Access control properly restricts non-admin users with 403 responses. The UsersPage.js component correctly shows 'Accesso Negato' for non-admin users. Test users created during testing are prefixed with 'TEST_' and cleaned up automatically by pytest teardown.

admin_user_list.response: List of users without password_hash or totp_secret

admin_create_user.validation: Rejects invalid roles and duplicate emails

admin_delete_user.validation: Cannot delete self, returns 404 for non-existent

admin_2fa_management.qr_code: Returns base64 PNG QR code for Microsoft Authenticator

frontend_users_page.user_list: Shows name, email, role badge, MFA status, action buttons
frontend_users_page.2fa_modal: QR code, manual key, verification input
